description: Manual mapping of AI labs to countries for Hugging Face Hub classification. Edit this file to add, remove, or reclassify labs. hf_authors are the organization slugs as they appear on huggingface.co.

country_codes.Other: Other (identified lab outside US and China)

labs.name: OpenAI
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Developer of GPT-4o, o1, o3, Sora.

labs.name: Anthropic
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Developer of Claude series.

labs.name: Google / DeepMind
labs.notes: Mountain View, CA / London, UK. Developer of Gemini, Gemma. Classified as US since Google is a US company.

labs.name: Meta AI
labs.notes: Menlo Park, CA. Developer of Llama series.

labs.name: Microsoft
labs.notes: Redmond, WA. Developer of Phi series. Primary investor in OpenAI.

labs.name: NVIDIA
labs.notes: Santa Clara, CA. Developer of Nemotron, Minitron.

labs.name: Allen Institute for AI
labs.notes: Seattle, WA. Developer of OLMo, Tulu, Dolma.

labs.name: Salesforce AI
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Developer of xGen, CodeT5, BLIP.

labs.name: Cohere
labs.notes: Toronto/San Francisco. Developer of Command series, Aya.

labs.name: Apple
labs.notes: Cupertino, CA. On-device models, OpenELM.

labs.name: Amazon
labs.notes: Seattle, WA. Titan models.

labs.name: Stability AI
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Stable Diffusion, Stable LM series.

labs.name: Together AI
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Open model research.

labs.name: xAI
labs.notes: San Francisco, CA. Developer of Grok.

labs.name: Mistral AI
labs.notes: Paris, France. Frontier model lab. Classified as Other — a clearly identified non-US, non-China lab.

labs.name: Alibaba / Qwen
labs.notes: Hangzhou. Alibaba DAMO Academy. Developer of Qwen, Qwen-VL, Qwen-Coder.

labs.name: DeepSeek
labs.notes: Beijing / Hangzhou. Developer of DeepSeek-V2, V3, R1.

labs.name: Zhipu AI / THUDM
labs.notes: Beijing. Tsinghua University spinout. Developer of ChatGLM, CogVLM.

labs.name: 01.AI
labs.notes: Beijing. Developer of Yi series.

labs.name: Baidu
labs.notes: Beijing. Developer of ERNIE series.

labs.name: ByteDance
labs.notes: Beijing. Developer of Doubao, Seed series.

labs.name: Shanghai AI Lab
labs.notes: Shanghai. Developer of InternLM series.

labs.name: Moonshot AI
labs.notes: Beijing. Developer of Kimi.

labs.name: MiniMax
labs.notes: Shanghai. Developer of MiniMax-Text series.

labs.name: Tencent
labs.notes: Shenzhen. Hunyuan model series.

labs.name: Huawei / Noah's Ark Lab
labs.notes: Shenzhen. Pangu model series.
